title: Campaigners to Protest at Prestwick Airport Over US Military Use

sections.heading: What happened
sections.content: Campaigners from various groups in Ayrshire are organizing a protest at Prestwick Airport. The demonstration is scheduled for this weekend and aims to raise awareness regarding the airport's use by the US military.

sections.heading: Why it matters
sections.content: The protest highlights ongoing concerns about military activities at Prestwick Airport. It reflects broader discussions about the implications of foreign military presence in the area, as well as its impact on local communities.

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – Campaigners to protest at Prestwick Airport over US military use
